mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (id, account, name, portrait, password, sex, email, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{account}, #{name}, #{portrait}, #{password}, #{sex}, #{email}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET name = #{name}, portrait = #{portrait}, sex = #{sex}, email = #{email}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
